sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 59:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 59:1
items.html: As long as the emanated degree does not receive the light that is intended for it, it is named after the Malchut of the degree above it (see answer 127).
